sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89069" key="prosemforhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσεμ-φορητέον</orth>, <sense id="n89069.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must put into</tr_> people's <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">minds</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐκείνοις τῆς δεισιδαιμονίας</foreign> ib. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1104b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
